Title: Senior .NET Engineer
FullDescription: We are seeking a Senior .NET Engineer to design and implement web applications using .NET 8 and Blazor Server. Responsibilities include system design, building UIs, mentoring teammates, and ensuring delivery quality.

Title: Frontend Developer (Blazor)
FullDescription: Work with designers to build responsive UIs using Blazor Server and Bootstrap. Good knowledge of CSS and JS interop is a plus.

Title: DevOps Engineer
FullDescription: Maintain infrastructure, setup pipelines on Render.com, ensure deployments are reliable and secure.
